raw_nodes.source_text: Chapter–14: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits

subtopics: Need for measurement; Units of measurement; Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units, fundamental and derived units

subtopics: Frame of reference; Motion in a straight line
key_concepts: Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration for describing motion
Average speed, average velocity, instantaneous velocity
Velocity-time and position-time graphs; Relations for uniformly accelerated motion (graphical and calculus treatment)

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities; Position and displacement vectors
key_concepts: General vectors, notations, equality of vectors
Multiplication by real number; Addition and subtraction of vectors
Unit vector; Resolution in a plane; Rectangular components
Scalar and Vector product of vectors
Motion in a plane: Uniform velocity/acceleration, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Intuitive concept of force; Inertia
key_concepts: Momentum and Newton's second law; Impulse
Law of conservation of linear momentum and its applications
Equilibrium of concurrent forces: Static/kinetic friction, rolling friction, lubrication

subtopics: Work done by constant/variable force; Kinetic energy
key_concepts: Potential energy (including spring); Conservative and non-conservative forces

units.unit_name: Motion of System of Particles and Rigid Body
explicit_chapters: System of Particles and Rotational Motion

chapters.chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
chapters.source_heading: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass: Two-particle system, Rigid body (uniform rod)
key_concepts: Momentum conservation and Centre of mass motion
Moment of force (Torque), Angular momentum; Conservation of angular momentum
Equilibrium of rigid bodies; Equations of rotational motion
Comparison of linear and rotational motions
Moment of inertia, Radius of gyration

subtopics: Kepler's laws of planetary motion
key_concepts: Acceleration due to gravity and its variation with altitude/depth
Gravitational potential energy and gravitational potential
Escape speed, Orbital velocity of a satellite

subtopics: Elasticity; Stress-strain relationship
key_concepts: Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus (qualitative), Poisson's ratio

subtopics: Pressure due to fluid column; Pascal's law
key_concepts: Streamline and turbulent flow, Critical velocity
Excess pressure across curved surface; Applications to drops, bubbles, capillary rise

subtopics: Heat, Temperature; Thermal expansion (solids, liquids, gases)
key_concepts: Heat transfer: Conduction, Convection, Radiation; Thermal conductivity
Blackbody radiation concepts: Wien's displacement Law, Stefan's law

subtopics: Thermal equilibrium; Zeroth law of thermodynamics
key_concepts: Second law of thermodynamics: State variables and equation of state
Change of gaseous state conditions (Isothermal, Adiabatic)

units.unit_name: Behaviour of Perfect Gases and Kinetic Theory of Gases

subtopics: Equation of state; Work done in compressing gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions and concept of pressure
Kinetic interpretation of temperature; RMS speed
Degrees of freedom, Law of equi-partition of energy (statement)

subtopics: Periodic motion: Time period, Frequency
key_concepts: Displacement as a function of time; Periodic functions and applications
Uniform circular motion and its equations
Content not explicitly detailed in provided text excerpt

topics: Electric charges and Conservation of charge
subtopics: Coulomb's law, forces between multiple charges, superposition principle, continuous charge distribution
Electric field due to point charge, electric dipole, torque on a dipole in uniform electric field
Gauss's theorem and applications (infinitely long wire, infinite plane sheet, spherical shell)

topics: Electric potential, potential difference, equipotential surfaces
subtopics: Potential due to point charge, dipole and system of charges; Potential energy of systems
Conductors, insulators, free/bound charges, dielectrics and polarization
Capacitors: capacitance, series/parallel combinations, parallel plate capacitor with/without dielectric
key_concepts: Energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Ohm's law, V-I characteristics (linear/non-linear), resistivity/conductivity, temperature dependence of resistance
Internal resistance of a cell, emf vs potential difference, combination of cells
Kirchhoff's rules and Wheatstone bridge

units.unit_name: Unit-III Magnetic Effects of Current and Magnetism

subtopics: Oersted's experiment, Biot-Savart law (circular loop), Ampere's law (straight wire)
Force on moving charge and current-carrying conductor in magnetic fields
Torque on current loop, magnetic dipole moment, Moving coil galvanometer
key_concepts: Definition of ampere via force between conductors
Current loop as a magnetic dipole

subtopics: Bar magnet as an equivalent solenoid (qualitative treatment)
Magnetic properties of matter and classification
